name: Potential Boot or Logon Initialization Scripts
notes: This rule triggers when a modification is made to Windows logon scripts to initialize boot or logon scripts.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Logon Scripts with UserInitMprLogonScript Registry
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Logon Scripts with UserInitMprLogonScript, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Logon Scripts with UserInitMprLogonScript Registry
TD_list: APPLY Potential Boot or Logon Initialization Scripts on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Logon Scripts with UserInitMprLogonScript, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Logon Scripts with UserInitMprLogonScript Registry
RED_list: Event name: Potential Boot or Logon Initialization Scripts
Event description: Detects when a modification is made to Windows logon scripts to initialize boot or logon scripts.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
